zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume於大約1040年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德阿比斯時，他的父親Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret27歲，母親Amalvine Benauges27歲。他於大約1070年與Arsinde de NARBONNE在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德拉 利艾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1103年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德沙吉馬卡爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume于大约1040年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德阿比斯时，他的父亲Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret27岁，母亲Amalvine Benauges27岁。他于大约1070年与Arsinde de NARBONNE在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德拉 利艾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1103年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德沙吉馬卡爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume was born about 1040, in Arbis, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret, was 27 and his mother, Amalvine Benauges, was 27. He married Arsinde de NARBONNE about 1070, in La Réole, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1103, in Saint-Macaire, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume est né environ 1040, à Arbis, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Amalvine Benauges, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Arsinde de NARBONNE environ 1070, à La Réole, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1103, à Saint-Macaire, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume um 1040 in Arbis, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret 27 und seine Mutter Amalvine Benauges 27. Er hat um 1070 in La Réole, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Arsinde de NARBONNE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1103 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Saint-Macaire, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume è nato il circa 1040 nel Arbis, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Amalvine Benauges, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Arsinde de NARBONNE circa 1070, nel La Réole, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1103, nel Saint-Macaire, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaumeが約1040年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドアルビスで生まれた時，父Guillaume Amanieu d'Albretは27歳，母Amalvine Benaugesは27歳であった。約1070年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドラ ルeオルでArsinde de NARBONNEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1103年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドサイント-マケアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 아비스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Amalvine Benauges(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1070년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 라 e일에서 Arsinde de NARBONNE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1103년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 세인트-마카어에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1040–ABT 1103: tany ho any amin'ny 1040–tany ho any amin'ny 1103

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Arbis, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Amalvine Benauges, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Arsinde de NARBONNE aproximadamente 1070, em La Réole, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1103, em Saint-Macaire, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume родился около 1040 г. в местности арбис, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Amalvine Benauges, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Arsinde de NARBONNE около 1070 г. в местности ла рeол, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1103 г. в местности сеинт-макеир, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

sm.ABT 1040–ABT 1103: e tusa o le 1040–e tusa o le 1103

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume Amanieu II de Bezaume nació aproximadamente 1040, en Arbis, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Amanieu d'Albret, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Amalvine Benauges, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Arsinde de NARBONNE aproximadamente 1070, en La Réole, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1103, en Saint-Macaire, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
